canonical_definition: Real-world medical consultation records from the iCliniq platform, used as an out-of-distribution test set to evaluate generalization in medical QA.
papers: Quantized but Deceptive? A Multi-Dimensional Truthfulness Evaluation of QuantizedLLMs

definitions.text: Real-world medical consultation records from the iCliniq platform, used as an out-of-distribution test set to evaluate generalization in medical QA.
definitions.paper: Quantized but Deceptive? A Multi-Dimensional Truthfulness Evaluation of QuantizedLLMs

definitions.text: A publicly available dataset containing de-identified medical consultation questions from users, intended for research and evaluation purposes.

characterization: Real-world medical consultation records from the iCliniq platform, used as an out-of-distribution test set to evaluate generalization in medical QA.

emnlp25: Quantized but Deceptive? A Multi-Dimensional Truthfulness Evaluation of QuantizedLLMs
